Description: Entity name used in API and database table creation
Display label for entity in UI
Flag indicating system-defined vs custom entity
CSS class for entity icon (e.g. 'fa fa-users')
JSON object with role-based CRUD permissions

Constraints: FOREIGN KEY -> entity(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

Description: Field name used as column name in entity table
Display label for field in UI
Mandatory field flag enforced at validation layer
Unique constraint flag (creates unique index if true)
Include in full-text search index flag
Track changes in audit log flag
Default value expression applied on record creation
Field in origin entity storing relationship
Field in target entity for bidirectional navigation
Optional username for authentication (alternative to email)
Timestamp of most recent successful login
User ID of last profile modifier
Unique role identifier (predefined UUIDs for system roles)

Constraints: FOREIGN KEY -> user(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY -> role(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY -> entity(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY -> role(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

Description: Source component or service generating log
User associated with log entry (if applicable)

Constraints: FOREIGN KEY -> job(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY -> user(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

Description: Sort order (lower number = higher in list)
Page structure definition with areas and nodes
CSS class for page icon in navigation

Constraints: FOREIGN KEY -> page(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

Description: Primary entity for database data sources
EQL query text for database data sources
Dynamic columns per field definitions - see Field Type Mapping

Constraints: FOREIGN KEY -> rec_{origin_entity}(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY -> rec_{target_entity}(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
